name: bulletgcss-ui
description: Version manifest for third-party libraries bundled in the BulletGCSS UI. Run download-libs.sh to fetch or update them. This file is NOT used with npm install — no node_modules are created.

notes.paho-mqtt: Version 1.1.0 is inferred — the bundled mqttws31.js file has no version string in its header. Verify before upgrading.
notes.open-location-code: Version 1.0.3 is inferred — the bundled olc.min.js file has no version string in its header. Verify before upgrading.
